audit_items.proof_trace: The check at L135-137 (`if (address(order.buyToken) != s_assetOut) revert InvalidBuyToken(...)`) is unconditionally applied on the only successful return path. No code path reaches the `return IERC1271.isValidSignature.selector` at L175 without passing this guard, so the invariant `order.buyToken == s_assetOut` is fully enforced for every valid signature acceptance.
